gold: Bạn gửi cho em giúp cái email đã đăng ký với ngân hàng hoặc là nếu có cách nào trực tiếp trên app thì giúp cho em để lần sau em chủ động thao tác hơn nha.

sigWerErrors.reason: 'nào' (which means 'any' or 'which') is replaced by 'đặt' (which means 'to book' or 'to place'), changing the meaning of the sentence from asking if there is any way to do something directly on the app to specifically asking if there is a way to book directly on the app. This alters the intent of the sentence.

'nha' and 'nhá' are both Vietnamese sentence-ending particles with very similar meanings and are often used interchangeably in casual speech. The substitution does not change the meaning of the sentence.
